## beehiiv authors get

Show an author by ID

### Synopsis

Get author

Retrieve a single author from a publication.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/authors/{authorId}

```
beehiiv authors get <authorId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv authors get author_123
beehiiv authors show author_123
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for get
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
